title: Example 6-9 life of a rotating shaft part under a stationary transverse load

notes: This file follows Example 6-9 on p307-p308.
The beam statics are assumed to have been done externally, so the bending moment at the critical section B is provided directly, as requested.
The shaft rotates while the transverse load is stationary, so the bending stress at the critical section is fully reversed.
K_t is fetched from table_a_15_9.json, then K_f is computed using Eqs. (6-35a), (6-34), and (6-33) unless overridden.
